text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking down the hallway<n>during lunch
break, I hear loud voices<n>coming from the
stairway.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am Uma Lord Golshi! Bow down to<n>me as I stand
perched atop the world!<n>Desist!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No! I'm no follower of yours!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good question! Long story short:<n>Golshi's
bein' the Uma Lord.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She got hooked on this one RPG, and<n>now she's
been role playing in<n>person all day!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For I am the Uma Lord! The one who<n>stands on
top! At the summit! Now<n>then—you there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The top is the strongest! The<n>strongest is the top!
So answer me<n>this, mortal: What does it take to
get<n>there?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Th-the top is the strongest?! The<n>strongest is the
top?! I got it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What you need is an unyielding heart!<n>A burning
spirit! The caliente will to<n>fight!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, easy there, tiger. What are you<n>getting all
fired up for? You're not a<n>little kid, y'know? Cool
it already...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Plebeian earthlings. You know<n>nothing! Follow me,
and I shall teach<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I shall build my castle here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What comes with being at the top? A<n>castle! I'll
build a castle and stand at<n>the very top of it. That'll
make me the<n>strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That'll make you... the strongest? I<n>see... Makes
sense!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait... But if you just wanna stand<n>somewhere
high up, wouldn't the<n>rooftop of the academy be
good<n>enough?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa! Do you not wish to<n>claim the top
yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you are indeed a condor, you must<n>aim for the
skies! The blue peak...<n>Don't you want the
mightiest throne<n>for yourself?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh... The mightiest throne! Sí! I<n>sure do!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then you'll need a castle! A grand<n>fortress with
spires soaring high<n>above mine own!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's survival of the fittest here...<n>Strength is the will
to rise above<n>others, for only then canst thou
change the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeeeah! The strong! The<n>transcendent! The
battle for the top!<n>Things are heating up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's get started! But first, what<n>do we do
about the castle?

El Condor Pasa appears to be getting<n>swept up in
Gold Ship's chaotic vibe.<n>I suppose if I have to
give her some<n>advice, then...
choice_data_list:
Maybe look for something you can use as the
castle?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Arrr! Looks like we'll need us a<n>fishing boat, then!
One with cannons!<n>We'll defeat the Great King
Squid and<n>become the fishing kings, me matey!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, wait, it'd probably be faster to<n>just find some
hidden treasure.<n>Yar-har! We be sailing the high
seas<n>as pirates, then!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What happened to being the<n>Uma Lord?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on, ye landlubber! Ye can hop<n>onto me ship,
arrr!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The high seas await us! To the<n>legendary island!
Anchors aweeeigh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! I-I'm not going anywhere! I<n>don't want to
take to the<n>se—AHHHHH?!

Gold Ship hoists up the reluctant El<n>Condor Pasa
and sets sail. I watch<n>them surge along the
Hallwayntic<n>Ocean until at last, they dip below the
distant horizon...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Then I know just the place!

Gold Ship races over to the jungle<n>gym, climbs to
the top, and raises her<n>hand in a lofty manner.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! I am Uma Lord Golshi!<n>Come at me,
El Condor Pasa the<n>hero!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hero?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Very well! As the world's strongest<n>hero, I'm
gonna drag you from that<n>throne!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hey, what're you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I wanna play too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see you've brought some of<n>your underlings
to tip the scales!<n>Excellent! Just try to catch me!
HUP!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! You're Soldier A now,<n>okay? Remember
your line?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Perfect!

I watch for a while as Gold Ship and<n>El Condor
Pasa play out the battle of<n>the Uma Lord versus
the heroes.
